events.name: BR_MIS_PRED
events.desc: Mispredicted or not predicted branch speculatively executed

events.name: BR_PRED
events.desc: Predictable branch speculatively executed

events.name: BR_IMMED_SPEC
events.desc: Branch speculatively executed, immediate branch

events.name: BR_RETURN_SPEC
events.desc: Branch speculatively executed, procedure return

events.name: BR_INDIRECT_SPEC
events.desc: Branch speculatively executed, indirect branch

events.name: BR_COND_PRED
events.desc: Predicted conditional branch executed. This event counts when any branch that the conditional predictor can predict is retired. This event still counts when branch prediction is disabled due to the Memory Management Unit (MMU) being off

events.name: BR_INDIRECT_MIS_PRED
events.desc: Indirect branch mispredicted. This event counts when any indirect branch that the Branch Target Address Cache (BTAC) can predict is retired and has mispredicted either the condition or the address. This event still counts when branch prediction is disabled due to the MMU being off

events.name: BR_INDIRECT_ADDR_MIS_PRED
events.desc: Indirect branch mispredicted due to address miscompare. This event counts when any indirect branch that the BTAC can predict is retired, was taken, correctly predicted the condition, and has mispredicted the address. This event still counts when branch prediction is disabled due to the MMU being off

events.name: BR_COND_MIS_PRED
events.desc: Conditional branch mispredicted. This event counts when any branch that the conditional predictor can predict is retired and has mispredicted the condition. This event still counts when branch prediction is disabled due to the MMU being off. Conditional indirect branches that correctly predict the condition but mispredict the address do not count

events.name: BR_INDIRECT_ADDR_PRED
events.desc: Indirect branch with predicted address executed. This event counts when any indirect branch that the BTAC can predict is retired, was taken, and correctly predicted the condition. This event still counts when branch prediction is disabled due to the MMU being off

events.name: BR_RETURN_ADDR_PRED
events.desc: Procedure return with predicted address executed. This event counts when any procedure return that the call-return stack can predict is retired, was taken, and correctly predicted the condition. This event still counts when branch prediction is disabled due to the MMU being off

events.name: BR_RETURN_ADDR_MIS_PRED
events.desc: Procedure return mispredicted due to address miscompare. This event counts when any procedure return that the call-return stack can predict is retired, was taken, correctly predicted the condition, and has mispredicted the address. This event still counts when branch prediction is disabled due to the MMU being off

events.name: L2D_TLB
events.desc: Attributable Level 2 data or unified TLB access

events.name: ITLB_WALK

events.desc: Level 1 data cache long-latency read miss

events.desc: L1D cache access, read

events.name: L1D_CACHE_REFILL_RD
events.desc: L1D cache refill, read

events.desc: L1D cache refill, write

events.name: L1D_CACHE_REFILL_INNER
events.desc: L1D cache refill, inner

events.name: L1D_CACHE_REFILL_OUTER
events.desc: L1D cache refill, outer

events.name: L2D_CACHE_RD
events.desc: L2D cache access, read

events.name: L2D_CACHE_WR
events.desc: L2D cache access, write

events.name: L2D_CACHE_REFILL_RD
events.desc: L2D cache refill, read

events.name: L2D_CACHE_REFILL_WR
events.desc: L2D cache refill, write

events.name: L3D_CACHE_RD
events.desc: Attributable Level 3 data or unified cache access, read

events.name: L3D_CACHE_REFILL_RD
events.desc: Attributable Level 3 data or unified cache refill, read

events.name: L2D_CACHE_REFILL_PREFETCH
events.desc: L2 cache refill due to prefetch. If the complex is configured with a per-complex L2 cache, this event does not count. If the complex is configured without a per-complex L2 cache, this event counts the cluster cache event, as defined by L3D_CACHE_REFILL_PREFETCH. If neither a per-complex cache or a cluster cache is configured, this event is not implemented

events.name: L1D_CACHE_REFILL_PREFETCH
events.desc: L1 data cache refill due to prefetch. This event counts any linefills from the prefetcher that cause an allocation into the L1 data cache

events.name: L2D_WS_MODE
events.desc: L2 cache write streaming mode. This event counts for each cycle where the core is in write streaming mode and is not allocating writes into the L2 cache

events.name: L1D_WS_MODE_ENTRY
events.desc: L1 data cache entering write streaming mode. This event counts for each entry into write streaming mode

events.name: L1D_WS_MODE
events.desc: L1 data cache write streaming mode. This event counts for each cycle where the core is in write streaming mode and is not allocating writes into the L1 data cache

events.name: L3D_WS_MODE
events.desc: L3 cache write streaming mode. This event counts for each cycle where the core is in write streaming mode and is not allocating writes into the L3 cache

events.name: LL_WS_MODE
events.desc: Last level cache write streaming mode. This event counts for each cycle where the core is in write streaming mode and is not allocating writes into the system cache

events.name: L2D_WALK_TLB
events.desc: L2 TLB walk cache access. This event does not count if the MMU is disabled

events.name: L2D_WALK_TLB_REFILL
events.desc: L2 TLB walk cache refill. This event does not count if the MMU is disabled

events.name: L2D_S2_TLB
events.desc: L2 TLB IPA cache access. This event counts on each access to the IPA cache. If a single translation table walk needs to make multiple accesses to the IPA cache, each access is counted. If stage 2 translation is disabled, this event does not count

events.name: L2D_S2_TLB_REFILL
events.desc: L2 TLB IPA cache refill. This event counts on each refill of the IPA cache. If a single translation table walk needs to make multiple accesses to the IPA cache, each access that causes a refill is counted. If stage 2 translation is disabled, this event does not count

events.name: L2D_CACHE_STASH_DROPPED
events.desc: L2 cache stash dropped. This event counts on each stash request that is received from the interconnect or the Accelerator Coherency Port (ACP), that targets L2 cache and is dropped due to lack of buffer space to hold the request

events.name: L1I_CACHE_LMISS
events.desc: Level 1 instruction cache long-latency read miss

events.name: L2D_CACHE_LMISS_RD
events.desc: Level 2 data cache long-latency read miss

events.name: L3D_CACHE_LMISS_RD
events.desc: Level 3 data cache long-latency read miss

events.name: STALL_FRONTEND
events.desc: No operation issued because of the frontend

events.name: STALL_BACKEND
events.desc: No operation issued due to the backend

events.name: STALL
events.desc: No operation sent for execution

events.name: STALL_SLOT_BACKEND
events.desc: No operation sent for execution on a slot due to the backend

events.name: STALL_SLOT_FRONTEND
events.desc: No operation sent for execution on a slot due to the frontend

events.name: STALL_SLOT
events.desc: No operation sent for execution on a slot

events.name: STALL_FRONTEND_CACHE
events.desc: No operation issued due to the frontend, cache miss. This event counts every cycle that the Data Processing Unit (DPU) instruction queue is empty and there is an instruction cache miss being processed

events.name: STALL_FRONTEND_TLB
events.desc: No operation issued due to the frontend, TLB miss. This event counts every cycle that the DPU instruction queue is empty and there is an instruction L1 TLB miss being processed

events.name: STALL_FRONTEND_PDERR
events.desc: No operation issued due to the frontend, pre-decode error

events.name: STALL_BACKEND_ILOCK
events.desc: No operation issued due to the backend interlock. This event counts every cycle where the issue of an operation is stalled and there is an interlock. Stall cycles due to a stall in the Wr stage are excluded

events.name: STALL_BACKEND_ILOCK_ADDR
events.desc: No operation issued due to the backend, address interlock. This event counts every cycle where the issue of an operation is stalled and there is an interlock on an address operand. This type of interlock is caused by a load/store instruction waiting for data to calculate the address. Stall cycles due to a stall in the Wr stage are excluded

events.name: STALL_BACKEND_ILOCK_VPU
events.desc: No operation issued due to the backend, interlock, or the Vector Processing Unit (VPU). This event counts every cycle where there is a stall or an interlock that is caused by a VPU instruction. Stall cycles due to a stall in the Wr stage are excluded

events.name: STALL_BACKEND_LD
events.desc: No operation issued due to the backend, load. This event counts every cycle where there is a stall in the Wr stage due to a load

events.name: STALL_BACKEND_ST
events.desc: No operation issued due to the backend, store. This event counts every cycle where there is a stall in the Wr stage due to a store

events.name: STALL_BACKEND_LD_CACHE
events.desc: No operation issued due to the backend, load, cache miss. This event counts every cycle where there is a stall in the Wr stage due to a load that is waiting on data. The event counts for stalls that are caused by missing the cache or where the data is Non-cacheable

events.name: STALL_BACKEND_LD_TLB
events.desc: No operation issued due to the backend, load, TLB miss. This event counts every cycle where there is a stall in the Wr stage due to a load that misses in the L1 TLB

events.name: STALL_BACKEND_ST_STB
events.desc: No operation issued due to the backend, store, Store Buffer (STB) full. This event counts every cycle where there is a stall in the Wr stage because of a store operation that is waiting due to the STB being full

events.name: STALL_BACKEND_ST_TLB
events.desc: No operation issued due to the backend, store, TLB miss. This event counts every cycle where there is a stall in the Wr stage because of a store operation that has missed in the L1 TLB

events.name: STALL_BACKEND_VPU_HAZARD
events.desc: No operation issued due to the backend, VPU hazard. This event counts every cycle where the core stalls due to contention for the VPU with the other core

events.name: STALL_SLOT_BACKEND_ILOCK
events.desc: Issue slot not issued due to interlock. For each cycle, this event counts each dispatch slot that does not issue due to an interlock

events.name: STALL_BACKEND_MEM
events.desc: Memory stall cycles

events.name: TRB_WRAP
events.desc: Trace buffer current write pointer wrapped

events.name: TRB_TRIG
events.desc: Trace buffer Trigger Event

events.desc: PE Trace Unit external output 3

events.desc: Cross-trigger Interface output trigger 4
